task_snapshots.title: [DECOMPOSE] Plan and decompose goal into tasks
task_snapshots.description:
A large task needs to be decomposed into 3-5 smaller, atomic subtasks.

## Original large task (id=8e0c499c6977)
**Title:** Plan and decompose goal into tasks
**Role:** manager
**Description:**
## Goal
test

## Your job
1. Read the task description carefully
2. Identify 3-5 specific, atomic subtasks (each completable in one agent session, < 30 min)
3. Each subtask should target specific files and have clear completion criteria
4. Create each subtask via the task server:
```bash
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8052/tasks -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"title": "...", "description": "... [subtask of 8e0c499c6977]", "role": "manager", "priority": 1, "scope": "small", "complexity": "medium"}'
```
5. After creating all subtasks, exit.

IMPORTANT: Each subtask description MUST include '[subtask of 8e0c499c6977]' so it can be tracked back to the original task.
